errors.couldNotLoad: Could not load. Pull to refresh.

landing.tagline: Your AI calling assistant for business
landing.subtitle: Hindi, Tamil, Bengali — 8 languages. Set up once, thousands of calls.
landing.feature1Body: Your assistant knows every caller's name and speaks to them in context.
landing.feature2Body: Hindi, Tamil, Bengali, Telugu, Kannada, Marathi, Gujarati, English — all of them.
landing.feature3Body: Set up once, start thousands of calls with one button. Track results live.
landing.terms: By continuing, you agree to our Terms of Service and Privacy Policy.

login.title: MakeMyCall
login.subtitle:
Your AI phone secretary.
Enter your number to get started.
login.terms: By continuing, you agree to our Terms of Service and Privacy Policy
login.devA11y: Sign in as a test user (dev only)
login.devNote:
Bypasses Firebase Phone Auth using a server-side mint.
Requires ALLOW_DEV_LOGIN + FIREBASE_WEB_API_KEY on the backend.

alerts.invalidNumberBody: Please enter a valid 10-digit phone number.
alerts.errInvalidPhone: That phone number doesn't look right.
alerts.errTooMany: Too many attempts. Try again in a few minutes.

alerts.errExpired: OTP expired. Tap Resend to get a new one.
alerts.sentBody: A new OTP has been sent to your phone.

profileSetup.title: Tell us about you and your business
profileSetup.subtitle: Just once. Then you're off to the home screen.
profileSetup.businessDescPlaceholder: I run a tuition center, Class 8-10, Hindi medium…
profileSetup.recordingHint: Or speak it instead — record your voice
profileSetup.voiceFootnote: Voice is sent to Sarvam for transcription. Audio is not stored.
profileSetup.footnote: Your assistant isn't created yet — it'll be ready when you make your first call.
profileSetup.useDifferentNumberBody: You'll need to log in again with the new number.

alerts.micBody: We need microphone permission to record your business description. You can enable it in Settings.
alerts.recordStartFailedBody: Try again, or type your description.
alerts.recordEmptyBody: No audio was captured. Please try again.
alerts.tapHoldBody: That recording was too short. Try again — speak naturally for a few seconds.
alerts.couldntHearBody: Try again — speak a bit louder or move somewhere quieter.
alerts.transcribeFailedSuffix: You can also type your description below.
alerts.tellMoreBody: Please describe your business in at least a few sentences so we can build a good assistant for you later.

home.emptyBody: One assistant per use case. Fees, class cancel, new batches.

campaigns.title: Calls
campaigns.emptyBody: Use Make My Call from the home screen.

new.couldNotLoadFallback: Could not load. Pull to refresh.
new.noContactsBody: You haven't saved any contacts yet. Add the people you want this assistant to call — by screenshot, paste, voice, or phone book.
new.callNowSub: Start as soon as I tap Launch
new.windowSub: Calls go out only between these times
new.windowHint: Type the hour like 8 or 08 — we'll normalise to HH:MM. Timezone: Asia/Kolkata.
new.windowError: End time must be after start time.
new.varsTitle: Anything to share with all of them?
new.varsSub: Optional. These are values used the same way for everyone in this call list — like a common deadline or location. Per-contact details (their pending amount, last visit, etc.) are picked up from the contact's saved info automatically.

alerts.noAgentBody: Set up your AI assistant before making calls.
alerts.agentNotReadyBody: Please try again in a moment.
alerts.needCreditsBody: These calls cost {{cost}} credits. You have {{balance}}.

detail.callsEmptyActive: No calls yet. They're happening now…

call.noTranscript: No transcript — the call didn't connect.

editProfile.title: Edit business profile
editProfile.subtitle: These details show up on the home screen and inform the agent's tone. Editing them here does NOT create a new agent.
editProfile.descHint: A short description of your business. The agent uses this for context when speaking with your customers.
editProfile.descPlaceholder: e.g. I run a small kirana store in Bengaluru. We sell groceries and household items…

alerts.savedBody: Your business profile has been updated.

agents.title: My assistants
agents.emptyBody: Create one for each calling use case.

new.title: New assistant
new.heading: What is this assistant for?
new.subtitle: What should this assistant do? Your business profile is already saved — just describe this assistant's job.
new.useCasePlaceholder: I want to call my students that tomorrow's class is cancelled…
new.voiceHint: Or speak it instead — record your voice
new.voiceFootnote: Voice is sent to Sarvam for transcription. Audio is not stored.
new.exampleHeading1: What should this assistant do for you

alerts.micBody: We need microphone permission to record your use case. Enable it in Settings.
alerts.recordStartFailedBody: Try again, or type your use case.
alerts.recordEmptyBody: No audio was captured. Please try again.
alerts.tapHoldBody: That recording was too short. Try again.
alerts.couldntHearBody: Try again — speak a bit louder.
alerts.tellMoreBody: Describe what this assistant should do in a sentence or two.

preview.failedFallback: Try once more — if it still doesn't work we'll help.
preview.firstTimeNote: First time takes a moment. Setting up your AI assistant…
preview.timedOut: It's taking a bit longer. You can come back in a few minutes.

tone.label: Tonality
tone.hint: How your assistant carries the conversation. Tap to change anytime.
tone.needDesc: Add a business description first to change tonality.

voice.label: Voice
voice.hint: Pick how your assistant sounds — male, female, regional accents. Coming in the next update.

testCall.title: Place a test call
testCall.subtitle: Your AI assistant will call this number now. Hear how it sounds before you start real calls.
testCall.nameHint: The agent will call this person by name (used as
testCall.phoneHint: 10-digit Indian number (we'll add +91), or include the full country code with a +.
testCall.footnote: One call per tap. The phone you enter will ring within a few seconds. Charges may apply per your business's call rates.

alerts.nameNeededBody: Please enter who we should call.
alerts.phoneFormatBody: Enter a 10-digit Indian number (we'll add +91), or include the full country code with a +.
alerts.callingNowFallback: Calling {{name}} at {{phone}}. Wait for the phone to ring.
alerts.testCallFailedFallback: Could not place the test call. Try again.

edit.title: Edit contact
edit.notesPlaceholder: Anything else worth remembering — context, preferences, last interaction.
edit.customFieldsHint: Free-form key/value pairs. Used as variables in call scripts (e.g. pending: ₹2400).
edit.deleteBody: {{name}} will be removed from your contacts list. Existing call history is not affected.
edit.notFoundBody: This contact may have been deleted. Going back.

contacts.anythingHint: e.g. pending amount, due date — or skip and use notes below.
contacts.notesHint: Free text. "udhaar 2400, very old customer" works fine.
contacts.emptyBody: Tap the + button to add your first contact

import.nothingNewBody: Every contact in your phone book is already saved here.

screen.title: Add your contacts
screen.subtitle: Bring in the people you want to call.
screen.pasteHelper: Paste your list — handwritten format, copy from WhatsApp, anything works.
screen.pastePlaceholder: Sharma ji 9876543210, Ramesh 8765432109 — 1500 pending, Aunty ji 7654321098

photo.slotText: Tap to add a photo or screenshot
photo.helper: Any image with names and numbers — a handwritten register, diary page, paper list, an Excel sheet on your laptop, a business card, or a screenshot. We'll pull out the contacts.

phoneMode.title: Open phone contacts
phoneMode.subtitle: Pull from your phone — review on the next screen.

review.emptyBody: Try a different mode — paste, photo, or voice.

skippedReasons.uiText: Looks like app text, not a contact

review.rowsSkippedSuffix_one: {{count}} row without a phone will be skipped.
review.rowsSkippedSuffix_other: {{count}} rows without a phone will be skipped.

alerts.needTextBody: Paste your list — write something first.
alerts.couldNotReadListBody: Server rejected the parse. Try a smaller chunk.
alerts.imagePickerUnavailableBody: Photo mode needs a dev-client rebuild. Run `npx expo run:android` (or your EAS dev build) once and try again.
alerts.cameraPermissionBody: Camera permission denied — enable it in Settings to take photos.
alerts.photosPermissionBody: Photos permission denied — enable it in Settings to pick from your gallery.
alerts.needPhotoBody: Pick or take a photo first.
alerts.couldNotReadPhotoBody: Try a clearer photo or different lighting.
alerts.micAccessBody: Microphone permission denied — enable it in Settings to dictate your list.
alerts.recordingFailedNoAudioBody: No audio was captured. Please try again.
alerts.tooShortBody: That recording was too short. Try again — speak naturally for a few seconds.
alerts.couldntHearBody: Try again — speak a bit louder or move somewhere quieter.
alerts.couldNotProcessRecordingBody: Try again, or use Paste / Photo instead.
alerts.contactsPermissionBody: MakeMyCall needs permission to read your contacts. Open Settings to enable it.
alerts.phoneBookEmptyBody: No contacts with phone numbers found on this device.
alerts.pickAtLeastOneBody: Tap the contacts you want to import.
alerts.noContactsSaveBody: Add at least one contact before saving.
alerts.noContactsCallBody: Add at least one contact before calling.
alerts.phoneNumbersMissingBody: Each contact needs a 10-digit phone. Tap a row to fix.
alerts.rowsSkippedBody_one: {{count}} contact has no valid phone and will be skipped. Continue?
alerts.rowsSkippedBody_other: {{count}} contacts have no valid phone and will be skipped. Continue?
alerts.missingAgentBody: Could not find your assistant. Go back and try again.

alerts.requiredBody: Name and phone number are required.
alerts.pickAtLeastOneBody: Tap the contacts you want to import.

pasteNotes.title: Paste your notes
pasteNotes.subtitle: Paste customer names, phone numbers, and what each call should be about. We'll structure them — review before adding.
pasteNotes.placeholder:
Ramesh 9876543210 — pending payment 200
Sita 9988776655 - asked for monthly plan
baaki sab se 100
pasteNotes.tip: Tip: edit your notes above and tap Re-parse, or add these contacts manually later.

alerts.couldNotParseBody: The server rejected the parse request. Try splitting the text into smaller chunks.
alerts.needPhoneBody_one: {{count}} row doesn't have a valid 10-digit phone. Either fix it, untick it, or add the phone manually before continuing.
alerts.needPhoneBody_other: {{count}} rows don't have a valid 10-digit phone. Either fix them, untick them, or add the phones manually before continuing.

language.title: Default language
language.subtitle: Used for new assistants and reminders.
